title: Sour Yolk Jamaican Stir-fry
description: A sick-day-friendly dish featuring egg yolks and pickled vegetables in a tangy sauce, perfect for those with dietary restrictions.

ingredients.name: Egg Yolks
ingredients.notes: Avoid using egg whites as the dish is dense and sick-day-friendly.

ingredients.name: Pickled Onions or Pickles (such as Gochujang or Dill Pickle)

instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add egg yolks to the pan and stir until they start to solidify, approximately 2-3 minutes.
Remove from heat and add pickled onions or pickles and fresh lime juice. Stir well to combine.
If needed for texture, gently fold in sour cream. Mix thoroughly to ensure consistency and flavor are evenly distributed.
